Admissions Home Important linkages Foreign and National Collaborations Foreign and National Collaborations The selected students have options to do their 8th semester at a nominal fee at the University of Florida & Nebraska, USA. All those students who have gone so far got assured admissions in their MS program and have taken up jobs in USA.
